svg.title: Dangerous Fall Detection Architecture
svg.desc: 3-stage pipeline: YOLOv8-Pose → Physics Metrics → Temporal Buffer → Alert

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What video sources does fall detection support?')
sendPrompt('Why use YOLOv8l-pose instead of smaller models?')
sendPrompt('How are 17 keypoints used for fall detection?')
sendPrompt('How is the torso angle calculated from keypoints?')
sendPrompt('How does bounding box aspect ratio detect lying down?')
sendPrompt('How does head below hips indicate a dangerous fall?')
sendPrompt('How is center-of-mass velocity used in fall detection?')
sendPrompt('How is the danger score 0-1 computed from all metrics?')
sendPrompt('How many frames confirm a real dangerous fall vs stumble?')
sendPrompt('How does the fall clear mechanism work?')
sendPrompt('What information does the fall alert event contain?')
